about.label: About
about.title:
Crafting Molecules,
Building Impact
about.description: Final-year Biochemistry student at IPB University with hands-on experience in laboratory testing, analytical evaluation, and data documentation. Skilled in operating analytical instruments, maintaining accurate records, and working in accordance with Good Laboratory Practice (GLP). Detail-oriented, highly organized, and eager to contribute to quality assessment and sensory evaluation.

projects.label: Featured Project
projects.title: Independent Pilot
projects.subtitle: Pengembangan Bina Diri & Keterampilan Sosial melalui Horticultural Therapy
projects.description: A holistic program designed for individuals with intellectual and mental disabilities at Rumah Azaki, Bogor. Combining horticultural therapy with structured activities to enhance self-care, cognitive, and social skills.
projects.impact_text: Up to 80% improvement in planting & plant care for intellectually disabled participants, and 40% improvement for mentally disabled participants.
